creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
Hi,

a few of my php web applications (namely net-mgmt/phpipam net-mgmt/cacti and www/drupal7), all installed in same jail won't authenticate from LDAP (AD) anymore.

The only change since they worked fine I see is:

Sep  9 12:08:26 web10 pkg[47449]: openldap-client-2.4.59_1 deinstalled
...
Sep  9 12:08:28 web10 pkg[47449]: openldap24-client-2.4.59_2 installed
...
Sep  9 12:08:33 web10 pkg[47449]: php74-ldap reinstalled: 7.4.23 -> 7.4.23

www/rt50 authenticates just fine from same jail to same AD, by means of p5-perl-ldap-0.6800. Also, multiple php applications on other hosts (namely www/nextcloud) which haven't yet got latest openldap-client authenticate fine from same AD.

Could it be that latest openldap24-client somehow broke php74-ldap functionality?

Thank you in advance,
